revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!----Categories where indicated at the bottom of the page, please; interwikis to Wikidata.---->
== Usage == <nowiki>{{tim|ifdef}}</nowiki> {{tim|ifdef}} offers links to a template (only) available on Meta.
== Caveats == At the moment it's not exactly the opposite of {{tim|tiw}} on Meta.
== See also == * {{lts}} * {{Ltsmeta|tim}} * {{Ltsmeta|tiw}} * {{Lts|ltsmeta}} * {{Lts|tiw}} is at the moment different from [[m:Template:Tiw|Meta]].
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other| | <!----Categories below this line, please:---->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Interwiki link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
